steps.title: Find the support relationship
steps.content: The first sentence says Langley helped pioneer literary use of Middle English. The next sentence supports that claim by saying his manuscripts contain the first documented uses of over 2,000 English words.

steps.title: Select a confirmation transition
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B signal contrast or concession, but the second sentence supports the first. Choice C adds a separate point, while the sentence is stronger than mere addition: it confirms the pioneering claim with evidence. The answer is D.
